final_prompt.prompt:
Create a brand identity system presentation for 染秋 (RAN QIU), a Chinese autumn fragrance brand rooted in Eastern philosophy and traditional dyeing aesthetics, intended for Behance portfolio or brand guideline deck.

Style/medium: brand identity guideline sheet with the tactile warmth of traditional Chinese paper arts and the quiet reverence of autumn contemplation
Composition: clean grid layout with three distinct zones — primary color swatch (dominant), secondary color swatch (supporting), typography specimen panel — generous breathing room between elements
Subject: 染秋 brand identity system showing color palette and typographic hierarchy for an autumn fragrance house
Scene/backdrop: warm off-white paper texture suggesting handmade mulberry paper or rice paper, subtle grain
Lighting/mood: the soft golden hour of late autumn, warm honey light filtering through maple leaves, a quiet pause before winter
Color palette: primary — the deep amber warmth of persimmon skin and osmanthus honey; secondary — the muted rust of maple leaves meeting cool dusk gray; accent notes of cinnamon brown and sandalwood smoke
Materials/textures: matte paper with the soft tooth of traditional Chinese xuan paper, ink settling into fiber, the gentle resistance of brush on absorbent surface
Text (verbatim): 染秋 (RAN QIU) — 品牌色彩与字体规范 / 主色 / 辅色 / 字体 / 桂花乌龙 / 琥珀枫叶 / 柿霜暮色
Constraints: clear hierarchy between primary and secondary colors, typography specimens showing both Chinese and Latin characters, all brand elements legible and copy-ready
Avoid: neon saturation, Western autumn clichés (pumpkins, Halloween), generic corporate branding coldness, 8K stuffer language
